svg.text: Managed Control Plane • Private Worker Nodes • Aurora Serverless v2 • MSK Kafka • Istio Ambient Mesh
Runs across 3 Availability Zones automatically • Fully managed by AWS • 99.95% SLA
Elastic Network Interfaces injected into your VPC subnets
Private Subnets (10.0.10-30.0/24) — EKS WORKER NODES (in YOUR VPC)
No public IPs • Egress via NAT • SG: ALB ingress only • Control Plane connects via ENIs
Istio Ambient Mesh 1.29 — mTLS STRICT • L4 AuthorizationPolicy • ztunnel
Amazon ECR — 5 Repos • Scan on Push • Lifecycle: Keep 10 • VPC Endpoint
EKS Addons: vpc-cni • coredns • kube-proxy • ebs-csi-driver • external-secrets
Amazon EKS 1.31 — Managed Node Groups • Cluster Autoscaler • Pod Identity Agent
SG: EKS nodes only • KMS encrypted • No public access
VPC Endpoints • Private DNS • No public access
User → ALB → Istio Gateway → UI Pod
ecom-db → Debezium CDC → MSK Kafka → Flink SQL → analytics-db
inventory-db → Debezium CDC → MSK Kafka → Flink SQL → analytics-db
All workloads in private subnets • ALB is the ONLY public endpoint • VPC endpoints for AWS services • Zero public IPs on nodes
BookStore Platform • AWS EKS Production Architecture • Terraform IaC
Control Plane: AWS-managed (3 AZ) • Worker Nodes: Customer VPC (private subnets) • Databases: Isolated DB subnets
